verses.text: No siampite aw, hih thu ngai un! No Israel mite aw, thudon un. Kumpipa' innkuante aw, ngai un! Note in midangte tungah thu a khen ding hinapi-in, note tungah thukhenna hong tung ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in mite' awkna dingin Mizpah mualah thang na siah uh a, mite' awkna dingin Tabor mualah ngenthang na hi uh hi
Note in mite' kiatna dingin Shittim-ah gum a thukpi-in na to uh hi; hih thu hangin note kong thuhilh ding hi
Israel-te' gamtatna khempeuh ka thei khin a, kei tungah bangmah hong im theilo ding uh hi. Kei tungah hong citaklo uh a, amaute, misia a suak khinta uh hi, a ci hi
Amaute' gamtatna in a Pasian kiang uh zuansak theilo hi. Amaute in nakpi takin milim biaknopna lungsim nei uh ahih manin Topa phawk khalo uh hi
Israel-te' kiphatsakna pen amau mah' siatna ding ahi hi. Amau' mawhna in amaute puksak ding a, Judah mite in zong pukpih ding uh hi
Topa tungah biakna-in piak dingin a tuute uh leh a bawngte uh paipih ding uh a, ahi zongin a mawkna suak ding hi. Topa in amaute nusia khin ahih manin amah mu zolo ding uh hi
Topa' tungah amaute citaklo uh a, midangte tawh zawlta nei uh hi. Tu-in amaute leh a neihsa khempeuh uh kisusia ding hi
Galdona ding zaksakna-in Gibeah khua-ah tuutal ki tum un la, Ramah khua-ah peengkul tum un. Bethaven khua-ah pataukohna gingsak un. Benjamin mite aw, kithawi un
Gimthuak ni hun hong tun' ciangin Israel mite in siatna thuak ding uh hi. A tung taktak ding thu, Israel mite lakah a gen ka hi hi
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mi uliante in gisuang khinin midangte' leitang keksak uh ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a, amaute tungah tuikhang bangin gimna ka tungsak ding hi
Israel in zong gimna thuakin a cimawh hita hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei kiangah hong pai nuamloin piak ding bangmah a neilote kiangah huhna ngen dingin pai hamtang hi
Tua ahih manin Israel ka beitumsak ding a, Judah ka beimangsak ding hi

Israel in ama cinatna kithei-in, Judah in ama liamna a kimuh ciangin kumpi lianpa kiangah huh ngen dingin Assiria gamah Israel va pai hi. Ahi zongin amah in amau' natna damsak theilo a, a liamna uh zong na damsak thei tuanlo hi
Humpinelkai' sukgawp bangin Israel leh Judah ka sugawp ding hi. Keimah teekteek in amaute balgawpin ka paisan ding hi. Amaute ka talkaihgawp ding a, kuamah in hon zolo ding hi, a ci hi
Ka mite in a mawhna hangun gimna thuakin kei hong zon'kik mateng ka tuaci nusiat phot ding hi. A lungkham uh ciangin kei hong zong ding uh hi.
